description: Mexican criminal group based in San Luis Potosí and Zacatecas, founded around 2012-2013 by Iván Velázquez Caballero (El Talibán/Z-50) after breaking with Los Zetas. Engaged in drug trafficking (especially fentanyl), migrant smuggling, and violent territorial disputes with CJNG, Sinaloa Cartel, and Los Zetas. Currently active.
